prompt: The model's face is clearly visible from a flattering 3/4 front angle, sharp eyes, natural smile, no side-profile hiding the face. ltra-cinematic underwater aquarium tunnel, massive whale shark swimming directly overhead, camera positioned extremely low near the floor using a 24mm wide-angle lens, beautiful Korean female standing slightly off-center, body facing the whale shark but turning her face 30 degrees toward the camera so her full facial expression is clearly visible, soft smile, eye contact partially toward camera, dramatic blue light rays, crystal-clear water, hundreds of tropical fish, giant manta rays, immersive tunnel perspective, foreground leading lines, luxury travel editorial photography, National Geographic quality, ultra realistic, HDR, volumetric lighting, depth of field, 8K, viral Instagram travel aesthetic.
